top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS carbon_percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS carbon_percentage
FROM atom
JOIN bond ON atom.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS carbon_percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'C' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS carbon_percentage
FROM atom
INNER JOIN connected ON atom.atom_id = connected.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond ON connected.bond_id = bond.bond_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS carbon_percentage
FROM atom
JOIN bond ON atom.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS carbon_percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'C' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS carbon_percentage
FROM atom
INNER JOIN connected ON atom.atom_id = connected.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond ON connected.bond_id = bond.bond_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS carbon_percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS carbon_percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';
